name: Vorago — The Devourer
description: Circle 3 Boss (Gluttony). Monstrous obese goat demon with multiple mouths.

textToImageTask.prompt: A towering bipedal humanoid goat demon abomination in A-pose, monstrously obese with multiple mouths across the distended belly each with gnashing teeth, sickly green-brown fur matted with bile and food remnants, short thick horns like a boar, massive arms ending in claw-hands large enough to grab a person, wearing chains wrapped around the torso that dig into the flesh, additional smaller goat faces growing from the shoulders, thick stumpy digitigrade legs, dozens of small beady hungry red eyes, 3 meters tall, stylized dark fantasy game boss character, full body front view, dark background

textTo3DPreviewTask.prompt: Monstrously obese bipedal goat demon, multiple mouths on belly, green-brown matted fur, boar horns, grabbing claws, chain-wrapped, 3m, A-pose

textTo3DRefineTask.texturePrompt: Sickly green-brown matted fur, multiple gnashing tooth-filled mouths, bile-stained flesh, rusted chains digging into fat, beady red eyes, parasitic shoulder faces
